name: Power - At a Bar
description:
One of Public Safety's fiends has taken it upon herself to declare her devil-superiority over the local patrons of some puny bar.

***********************************

The funny little Blood Fiend is loose again. Uhm. Oh, yeah, this was a request from William Johnny, so you have him to thank for Power being in this series of bots :>

Fun fact! I was carrying volume 2 around in my little shoulder bag at school, and one of my teachers noticed, and was like "Are you reading Chainsaw Man?" And my eyes lit up and I was all like "Hell yeah sister!" (I didn't actually say that verbatum but that was very much the vibe) And then we yapped about Chainsaw Man and Tatsuki Fujimoto for a bit. Baller teacher, my goat for being a fellow Chainsaw Man fan. A fan of Tatsuki Fujimoto is a friend of mine.
creator: Asatistic
